title: See Through Smoke: Robust Indoor Mapping with Low-cost mmWave Radar
authors: Chris Xiaoxuan Lu; Stefano Rosa; Peijun Zhao; Bing Wang; Changhao Chen; John A. Stankovic; Niki Trigoni; Andrew Markham
venue: The 18th Annual International Conference on Mobile Systems, Applications, and Services
summary_cn: milliMap 使用低成本单芯片毫米波雷达进行室内稠密栅格地图重建，并在烟雾等低能见度环境下保持鲁棒性。
why_include_cn: MobiSys 2020 论文，明确属于白名单 venue，且直接面向毫米波雷达室内成像/建图与稠密地图重建。
download_note: Final venue is MobiSys 2020; arXiv is kept only as an open PDF source.
